title: Prepare and use explosives
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Prepare and use explosives demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for blasting

pcs.text: Obtain permits/licences and approved warning signs installed and prominently displayed according to legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain permits/licences and approved warning signs installed and prominently displayed according to legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain permits/licences and approved warning signs installed and prominently displayed according to legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Notify property manager, neighbours and controlling authority and other stakeholders of blasting plan and timing according to legislation
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Notify property manager, neighbours and controlling authority and other stakeholders of blasting plan and timing according to legislation?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Notify property manager, neighbours and controlling authority and other stakeholders of blasting plan and timing according to legislation.

pcs.text: Clear blast site of stones and other potential missiles and ensure the site is made safe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear blast site of stones and other potential missiles and ensure the site is made safe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear blast site of stones and other potential missiles and ensure the site is made safe.

pcs.text: Place explosive products at required safety distance from identified hazards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place explosive products at required safety distance from identified hazards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place explosive products at required safety distance from identified hazards.

pcs.text: Prepare holes for charge(s) according to blasting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare holes for charge(s) according to blasting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare holes for charge(s) according to blasting plan.

pcs.text: Remove equipment used for preparing holes to prescribed safe distance according to Australian Standards, legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove equipment used for preparing holes to prescribed safe distance according to Australian Standards, legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove equipment used for preparing holes to prescribed safe distance according to Australian Standards, legislation and regulations.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for blasting

elements.title: Prepare explosives

pcs.text: Calculate quantities of explosive components required to achieve the desired blast for prevailing conditions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate quantities of explosive components required to achieve the desired blast for prevailing conditions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate quantities of explosive components required to achieve the desired blast for prevailing conditions.

pcs.text: Transport explosives or explosive mix to site according to workplace health and safety procedures and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Transport explosives or explosive mix to site according to workplace health and safety procedures and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Transport explosives or explosive mix to site according to workplace health and safety procedures and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Calculate the precise explosive components to ensure minimum residual mix to be destroyed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Calculate the precise explosive components to ensure minimum residual mix to be destroyed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Calculate the precise explosive components to ensure minimum residual mix to be destroyed.

pcs.text: Prepare explosives according to defined recipe and requirements according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare explosives according to defined recipe and requirements according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare explosives according to defined recipe and requirements according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Assemble fusing and detonating components for explosive requirements in preparation for blasting
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assemble fusing and detonating components for explosive requirements in preparation for blasting?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assemble fusing and detonating components for explosive requirements in preparation for blasting.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Prepare explosives

elements.title: Place charges

pcs.text: Place or pack explosives elements in prepared holes according to safe working procedures, Australian Standards, legislation and regulations
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place or pack explosives elements in prepared holes according to safe working procedures, Australian Standards, legislation and regulations?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place or pack explosives elements in prepared holes according to safe working procedures, Australian Standards, legislation and regulations.

pcs.text: Stem and tamp holes prior to the attachment of the firing system according to blasting requirement and safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stem and tamp holes prior to the attachment of the firing system according to blasting requirement and safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stem and tamp holes prior to the attachment of the firing system according to blasting requirement and safety procedures.

pcs.text: Check electrical firing circuits or fire fuses for continuity and/or earthing
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check electrical firing circuits or fire fuses for continuity and/or earthing?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check electrical firing circuits or fire fuses for continuity and/or earthing.

pcs.text: Clear extraneous materials from blast site to safe distances in accordance with workplace standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clear extraneous materials from blast site to safe distances in accordance with workplace standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clear extraneous materials from blast site to safe distances in accordance with workplace standards.

pcs.text: Re-check blast site and surrounds to ensure that non-essential personnel are not endangered
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Re-check blast site and surrounds to ensure that non-essential personnel are not endangered?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Re-check blast site and surrounds to ensure that non-essential personnel are not endangered.

pcs.text: Place blasting mats or other control devices according to blasting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place blasting mats or other control devices according to blasting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place blasting mats or other control devices according to blasting plan.

pcs.text: Guard blast area according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Guard blast area according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Guard blast area according to legislative requirements and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Place charges

elements.title: Fire charges

pcs.text: Implement prescribed warning notification procedures according to workplace procedures and industry standards
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement prescribed warning notification procedures according to workplace procedures and industry standards?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement prescribed warning notification procedures according to workplace procedures and industry standards.

pcs.text: Re-check blasting site to ensure correct placement of explosives and all safety procedures have been implemented according to supervisor or shot firer instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Re-check blasting site to ensure correct placement of explosives and all safety procedures have been implemented according to supervisor or shot firer instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Re-check blasting site to ensure correct placement of explosives and all safety procedures have been implemented according to supervisor or shot firer instructions.

pcs.text: Implement audible and visual warning signals according to workplace safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement audible and visual warning signals according to workplace safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement audible and visual warning signals according to workplace safety procedures.

pcs.text: Initiate firing procedures using manual or electric firing system according to blasting plan
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Initiate firing procedures using manual or electric firing system according to blasting plan?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Initiate firing procedures using manual or electric firing system according to blasting plan.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Fire charges

elements.title: Conduct post-firing procedures

pcs.text: Ensure misfires are identified prior to all-clear signals being given by count charges during firing procedure or inspection of blast site
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure misfires are identified prior to all-clear signals being given by count charges during firing procedure or inspection of blast site?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure misfires are identified prior to all-clear signals being given by count charges during firing procedure or inspection of blast site.

pcs.text: Implement misfire procedures according to workplace and regulatory requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Implement misfire procedures according to workplace and regulatory requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Implement misfire procedures according to workplace and regulatory requirements.

pcs.text: Ensure site is safe and all-clear signal is given according to industry practice and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure site is safe and all-clear signal is given according to industry practice and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure site is safe and all-clear signal is given according to industry practice and legislative requirements.

pcs.text: Discard, destroy or store surplus, unserviceable and defective explosives and detonators according to workplace and environmental procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Discard, destroy or store surplus, unserviceable and defective explosives and detonators according to workplace and environmental procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Discard, destroy or store surplus, unserviceable and defective explosives and detonators according to workplace and environmental procedures.

pcs.text: Maintain records according to workplace and legislative requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Maintain records according to workplace and legislative requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Maintain records according to workplace and legislative requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Conduct post-firing procedures
